rule.name: towards soft
rule.message: In American English, "toward" is often preferred.

rule.name: amongst soft
rule.message: In American English, "among" is often preferred.

rule.name: whilst soft
rule.message: In American English, "while" is often preferred.

rule.name: grey soft
rule.message: In American English, "gray" is often preferred.

rule.name: colour soft
rule.message: In American English, "color" is often preferred.

rule.name: favourite soft
rule.message: In American English, "favorite" is often preferred.

rule.name: centre soft
rule.message: In American English, "center" is often preferred.

rule.name: organise soft
rule.message: In American English, "organize" is often preferred.

rule.name: realise soft
rule.message: In American English, "realize" is often preferred.

rule.name: behaviour soft
rule.message: In American English, "behavior" is often preferred.

rule.name: travelled soft
rule.message: In American English, "traveled" is often preferred.

rule.name: cancelled soft
rule.message: In American English, "canceled" is often preferred.

rule.name: modelled soft
rule.message: In American English, "modeled" is often preferred.

rule.name: humour soft
rule.message: In American English, "humor" is often preferred.

rule.name: labour soft
rule.message: In American English, "labor" is often preferred.

rule.name: defence soft
rule.message: In American English, "defense" is often preferred.

rule.name: licence soft
rule.message: In American English, "license" is often preferred for the noun.

rule.name: analyse soft
rule.message: In American English, "analyze" is often preferred.

rule.name: theatre soft
rule.message: In American English, "theater" is often preferred.

rule.name: catalogue soft
rule.message: In American English, "catalog" is often preferred.

rule.name: dialogue soft
rule.message: In American English, "dialog" is often preferred (UI/software contexts).

rule.name: programme soft
rule.message: In American English, "program" is often preferred.

rule.name: neighbour soft
rule.message: In American English, "neighbor" is often preferred.

rule.name: cheque soft
rule.message: In American English, "check" is often preferred for bank drafts.

rule.name: tyre soft
rule.message: In American English, "tire" is often preferred.

rule.name: aluminium soft
rule.message: In American English, "aluminum" is preferred.

rule.name: storey soft
rule.message: In American English, "story" is often preferred for building floors.
